title: Pydio Cells
description: Self-hosted document sharing and collaboration platform: a file-sync, sharing and content-management server for organizations.
installation: Pydio Cells requires a MySQL/MariaDB database (provided here by the mariadb add-on). Rotate the default DB password ('pydio') and the random CELLS_ENABLE_METRICS/secret placeholders before going to production. On first run Cells auto-installs against the database when CELLS_INSTALL_YAML is unset and the DB env vars are present; otherwise open the app URL and complete the web installer using DB host pydio-mysql:3306, db/user/pass = pydio. Set CELLS_SITE_EXTERNAL to the app URL (handled via {{KUBERO_APP_URL}}). TLS is terminated at the ingress, so the container runs plain HTTP (CELLS_SITE_NO_TLS=1). Cells stores config, logs and uploaded files under /var/cells (persistent volume). For large-scale search/object storage Cells embeds MinIO and a Bleve index by default; no external Elasticsearch/S3 is required for a single-node deployment.
